zh.Hames-Boucres, 62408, Pas-de-Calais, Nor: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯哈-布可雷斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Guînes於大約1210年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯時，他的父親Comte Arnould II de Guînes35歲，母親Béatrice de BOURBOURG32歲。他於1236年與Maroitte de Hames在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯哈-布可雷斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於從1244年到1283年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Guînes于大约1210年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯时，他的父亲Comte Arnould II de Guînes35岁，母亲Béatrice de BOURBOURG32岁。他于1236年与Maroitte de Hames在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯哈-布可雷斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于从1244年到1283年。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guînes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Irish Guinness, a shortened form of McGinnis . This surname is found predominantly in TX.

variants.name: McGinnis
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Aonghuis or Mag Aonghusa ‘son of Aonghus’ (see Angus ). This is the surname of a chieftain family in western County Down. Compare the Scottish form McInnis , and the variant McNeese . Compare also McGuinness .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Guînes was born about 1210, in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Comte Arnould II de Guînes, was 35 and his mother, Béatrice de BOURBOURG, was 32. He married Maroitte de Hames in 1236, in Hames-Boucres, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died from 1244 to 1283.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Guînes est né environ 1210, à Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Comte Arnould II de Guînes, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de BOURBOURG, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Maroitte de Hames en 1236, à Hames-Boucres, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé du 1244 au 1283.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Guînes um 1210 in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Arnould II de Guînes 35 und seine Mutter Béatrice de BOURBOURG 32. Er hat 1236 in Hames-Boucres, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Maroitte de Hames geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb von 1244 bis 1283.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Guînes è nato il circa 1210 nel Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Arnould II de Guînes, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de BOURBOURG, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Maroitte de Hames nel 1236, nel Hames-Boucres, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì da 1244 a 1283.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Guînesが約1210年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスグiンスで生まれた時，父Comte Arnould II de Guînesは35歳，母Béatrice de BOURBOURGは32歳であった。1236年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスハムス-ボウクレスでMaroitte de Hamesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はから1244年まで1283年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Guînes(이)가 대략 1210년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Arnould II de Guînes(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de BOURBOURG(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1236년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 함스-보우크레스에서 Maroitte de Hames(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1244년 부터 1283년 까지 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Guînes nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Comte Arnould II de Guînes, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de BOURBOURG, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Maroitte de Hames em 1236, em Hames-Boucres, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu de 1244 a 1283.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Guînes родился около 1210 г. в местности гуiнесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Arnould II de Guînes было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de BOURBOURG, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Maroitte de Hames в 1236 г. в местности хамес-боукресь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер с 1244 по 1283.

sm.um 1210–from 1244 to 1283: e tusa o le 1210–mai le 1244 e o'o I le 1283

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Guînes nació aproximadamente 1210, en Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Comte Arnould II de Guînes, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Béatrice de BOURBOURG, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Maroitte de Hames en 1236, en Hames-Boucres, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió desde 1244 hasta 1283.
